uri:
https://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/sparql?query=
    PREFIX dc: <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/>
    PREFIX sssom: <https://w3id.org/sssom/schema/>
    PREFIX text: <http://jena.apache.org/text#>
    PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

    select ?subj ?pred ?obj where { ?a a sssom:Mapping .
    ?a sssom:subject_id ?subj .
    <http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/collection/R08/current/> skos:member ?subj.
    ?a sssom:predicate_id ?pred .
    ?a sssom:object_id ?obj .
    <http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/collection/R23/current/> skos:member ?obj.}

https://www.ocean-ops.org/api/1/data/platform?exp=["networkPtfs.network.name='Argo' and ptfDepl.lon>=$var1 and ptfDepl.lon<=$var2 and ptfDepl.lat>=$var3 and ptfDepl.lat<=$var4 and ptfDepl.deplDate>=$var5 and ptfStatus>=$var6", -90, 0, 0, 90, "2022-01-01 00:00:00", 4]&include=["ref","ptfDepl.lat","ptfDepl.lon","ptfDepl.deplDate","ptfStatus.id","ptfStatus.name","ptfStatus.description","program.nameShort","program.country.nameShort","ptfModel.nameShort","ptfDepl.noSite"]
